problem: A box contains 5 white balls and 6 black balls.  A ball is drawn out of the box at random.  What is the probability that the ball is white?

classified_questions.question: Can you describe the first step in finding the probability of drawing a white ball?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: What would happen to the probability if there were more white balls in the box? How about if there were more black balls?
